summary: Fixed Grok Imagine video defaults and added reference-to-video support via a new grok-video-reference tool, with docs and live smoke test coverage updated.
filesChanged: extensions/grok/_shared/imagineClient.ts - fixed default model, added video model override and generateReferenceVideo

raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Grok Imagine video gap fix: default video model now uses the working bare `grok-imagine-video`, added client support for reference→video, registered a new `grok-video-reference` pi tool, and updated docs/tests.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/grok/_shared/imagineClient.ts` - fixed default model, added per-call video model override, added `generateReferenceVideo`.
- `extensions/grok/videoreference/index.ts` - new `grok-video-reference` tool.
- `extensions/grok/package.json` - registers new tool.
- `extensions/grok/README.md` - documents reference→video, model notes, params, packaging.
- `extensions/grok/test/imagine_live_test.mjs` - imports new tool/client and adds reference→video smoke.
- `extensions/grok/test/imagine_test.sh` - updated test description.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/grok/test/imagine_test.sh`

## Notes
Self-checks passed: jiti loaded the updated Imagine client + tool modules, default model resolved to `grok-imagine-video`, `git diff --check` clean, and unauthorised test path skips cleanly.
